rules.name: WHOIS Registry Database Found
rules.explanation: Active registration records were successfully resolved from WHOIS servers, confirming registrars and registrants.

rules.name: DNS Zone Resolver Active
rules.explanation: Authoritative DNS zones were crawled and validated, resolving IP addresses, mail routing, or nameservers.

rules.name: GitHub Intelligence Active
rules.explanation: A public or verified open-source repository and user/org footprint were indexed on GitHub.

rules.name: Global News & Media Mentions Found
rules.explanation: Target footprint was corroborated in global publications, press archives, or verified media.

rules.name: Multiple Independent Sources Agree
rules.explanation: Multiple independent intelligence connectors successfully corroborated the same target profile indicators.

rules.name: Missing Critical Infrastructure Pillars
rules.explanation: Target lacks key infrastructure anchors (both WHOIS and DNS), indicating an unmapped ghost presence.

rules.name: Contradictory Telemetry Detected
rules.explanation: Sensors reported severe metadata inconsistencies, ownership mismatches, or revoked credentials.

rules.name: Suspicious Infrastructure Signals
rules.explanation: Target matches known threat variables, unsecured asset crawls, or exposed/vulnerable configurations.

rules.name: Missing Security & Compliance Policies
rules.explanation: No active SECURITY.md policy, Dependabot tracking, or vulnerability guidelines were identified.

rules.name: Newly Registered Domain Signature
rules.explanation: WHOIS records indicate target domain creation date is recent (under 2 years), increasing exposure window risks.

rules.name: Disposable Email Provider Usage
rules.explanation: Associated registry contacts utilize a transient or anonymous disposable email handler.

rules.name: Inconsistent Ownership Registry
rules.explanation: Identified registrant contacts, organizational names, or addresses contain discrepancies across sensors.

rules.name: Large Density of Unresolved Findings
rules.explanation: A high count of active vulnerabilities, open issues, or warning events remains unmitigated.

rules.name: Long-Established Domain Track Record
rules.explanation: WHOIS records verify long-standing domain history (over 5 years), indicating institutional stability.

rules.name: Verified GitHub Organization Footprint
rules.explanation: Profile telemetry is certified under a verified enterprise or organization account structure.

rules.name: Stable Core Infrastructure Mappings
rules.explanation: Standard DNS configuration resolved multiple core nameservers and stable routing nodes.

rules.name: Strong Codified Security Posture
rules.explanation: Explicit threat screening, automated alerts, and strong security scores are configured in target's workspace.
